Telemetry.// StorageLinkId: PRIMARY object storage: the Id (GUID) of a registered StorageLink (AWS S3 / Cleura S3 / MinIO) whose credentials live in the vault. When set, sealed segments go to that provider via the app's existing StorageLink abstraction. Leave empty to use the flat ObjectStorage config below or local disk.
Telemetry.// ObjectStorage: Alternative flat S3/MinIO config for setups without a StorageLink. Leave Bucket/AccessKey empty to store sealed segments on local disk under DataPath.
